description_long: This object is a round, medium-sized apple with a vibrant red skin, subtly streaked with lighter yellowish hues and a natural sheen that suggests freshness. The surface is smooth with a slight gloss, and the apple's shape is slightly asymmetrical, bulging more on one side. A short, brown stem protrudes from the top center, emerging from a shallow dimple. The apple's skin appears unblemished and taut, with no visible bruises or cuts. Its coloration and form are reminiscent of popular apple varieties found in grocery stores and urban markets. The object is depicted isolated on a plain, white background, emphasizing its clean and fresh appearance.
description: A glossy, red apple with a short brown stem and smooth, unblemished skin.
description_view_0: Front view showing a rounded, red apple with a visible stem and a prominent highlight.
description_view_1: Slightly rotated, revealing more of the apple's left side and a subtle bulge.
description_view_2: Opposite angle, with the stem leaning left and the apple's right side more visible.
description_view_3: Back view, stem upright, showing the apple's rear curvature and even coloration.
